titleStmt.title: SII 9.134: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 134. (A.R. No. 9 of 1928.) ON A STONE PLANTED IN FRONT OF THE MALLESVARA TEMPLE AT SIVAPURAM, NANDIKOTKUR TALUK, KURNOOL DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is dated Śaka 991, Saumya, Āshāḍha, amāvāsye, Maṅgaḷavāra, Sūrya-grahaṇa corresponding to A.D. 1069, July 21 Tuesday when there was a solar eclipse. It refers itself to the reign of the Chāḷukya king Bhuvanaikamalladēva and records that, at the request of the chief queen Kañchaladēvī, the king granted some village (name lost) in Ayije three-hundred to Surēśvara-Paṇḍita, disciple of Gaṅgarāśi-Bhaṭṭāraka of the Kālāmukha sect, for the satra in the temple of the god Mallikārjuna at Śivapura and for imparting education; at the request of the queen Maiḷaladēvī, he granted to the same person and to Dēvaśakti-Paṇḍita, for their own use, the village Kareya-Pāḷya.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . samastabhuvanāśraya
ś®prithvīvallabha mahārā
jādhirāja paramēśvara paramabha
ṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ
cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadbhuvanai
kamalladēvara vijayarājyamu
ttarōttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamāna
mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ salu
ttumire tatpādapadmōpajīvi
gaḷappanavarataparamaka
lyāṇābhyudayasahaśrapha
ḷabhōgabhāgini dayādāna
dharmmōdyōgini pativratāguṇa
sāvit® parivārabharasamuddha
raṇaditri śriṁgāravidyādha
ri sakaḷakaḷādhari yanava
ratasutārahārāvariṣe
rāyakaṁdarppahridayaha
riśōtkariśe rāyadāmōda
rānurāgapratyakṣalakṣmi ya
vvanavanavasaṁtalakṣmi saubhā
gyanidhānadīpavartti sakaḷa
digaṁtaraḻpravarttitakīrttiyaṁ
taṟpuracūḍāmaṇi vaṁdibriṁ
daciṁtāmaṇi rūpalāvaṇya
hāvabhāvaviḷāsavibhra
mōdbhāsini ś®madbhuva
naikamalladēvaviśāḷa
vakṣasthaḷanivāsiniya

rappa śrīmatpiriyarasi kaṁ
calamahādēviyara binna
padiṁ śrīparvvatada yamaniya
masvādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamō
nānuṣṭhāṇajapasamādhiśīḷa
guṇasaṁpannarmadamattamātaṁ
gakaṁṭhīravar krōdhēndhanamahā
naḷarmmōhamahīruha
praḷeyakālamahāmārutarkkā
ḷāmukhasameyasarōvararā
jahaṁsarllākuḷasiddhāṁtanai
yyāyikanaḷinīdivākarar
madhyāhnakaḷpavṛkṣargguruku
ḷasamuddharaṇar śrīśaiḷapa
ścimadvāratōraṇar śrīma
nmallikārjjunadēvadarśanakāra
ṇapuruṣar śrīmatkiṭṭigā
veya saṁbaṁdhi mosaṁgiya
brahmēśvaradācāryyarggaṁga
rāsibhaṭṭārakara śiṣyarssurē
śvarapaṁḍitargge sakanṛpa
kāḷātītasaṁvatsara
sataṁgaḷ 991 neya sau
myasaṁvatsaradāśāḍamā
sadamāvāsye maṁgaḷavāradaṁ
dina śūryyagrahaṇanimi
ttadiṁ piriyarasi kaṁcalama
hādēviyarkkālgaḻcalā
śrīmadbhuvanaikamalla
dēvar dhārāpūrvvakaṁ mā
ḍi śivapurada pratibaddhamā
gi mallikārjunadēvaralli naḍe
yisuva śatrakkaṁ śiva
purada śatrakkaṁ vidyādāna
kkaṁ Ayije mūnūṟaṟa

śrīmatpiriyarasi maiḷala
dēviyara binnapadindaṁ dēva
ra sannidhānadoḷ svasti ya
maniyamasvādhyāyadhyā
nadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhāṇa
japasamādhisaṁpannarma
damattamātaṁgakaṇṭhīra
varkrōdhēndhanamahānaḷarmmō
hamahīruhapraḷaya
kāḷamahāmārutar kāḷā
mukhasamayasarōva
rarājahaṁsarlākuḷasi
ddhāntanaiyāyikanaḷinī
divākararmmadhyāhnakaḻpa
vrikṣarggurukuḷasamu
daraṇar śrīśaiḷapaści
mādvāratōraṇarmalli
kārjjunadēvadarśanakāra
ṇapurṣar śrīmatkiṭṭagā
veya sammandhi mosagi
ya brahmēśvaradācāryya
ru gaṁgarāsibhaṭṭāraka
ra śiṣyaru surēśvarapa
ṇḍitarggaṁ dēvaśaktipaṇḍi
targgaṁ

ma sanavoḷala
ppaḷi kāreyapā
ḷyamaṁ tribhōgābhyaṁta
rasiddhiyāge biṭṭu sa
rvvanamaśyamāge ko
ṭṭar © Ī dharmmamanā
vanōrvvanaḷidavaṁ bāṇa
rāśi prayāgeyargghya
tīrttha kurukṣētra
meṁbī tīrtthasthānaṁgaḷo
ḷsāsira kavilega
ḷmaṁ sāsirvvarttapōdhana
rumaṁ sāsirvvarvvēda
pāragarappa sabrā
hmaṇarumaṁ svahasta
diṁdamaḷida mahā
pātakaṁ . © ślōkaṁ ©
sāmānyōyaṁ dha
rmmasēturnripāṇāṁ kā
ḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō
bhavadbhissarvān Ētān
bhāvinaḥ pārtthivēṁdrā
n bhūyō bhūyō
yācatē rāmacaṁdraḥ .
svadattāṁ paradattāṁ vā
yō harēdvasundharāṁ
ṣaṣṭirvvarṣasahaśrāṇi
viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē
krimiḥ . maṅgaḷa
mahāśrī .
Digital edition of SII 9.134 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
